name: Hydrox Cookie Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix milk, egg yolks, and marshmallows. Heat to custard consistency.
2. Cool mixture.
3. Add beaten egg whites and whipped cream. Mix thoroughly.
4. Mash cookies and add melted butter to make crumbs. Reserve a few tablespoons of crumbs for later.
5. Place all but the reserved crumbs on the bottom of a 9 x 13-inch pan.
6. Spread custard mixture evenly over the crumbs.
7. Sprinkle the reserved crumbs over the top.
8. Chill until firm.
NOTE: Oreo Single filling and Hydrox cookies are about the same. If you can't find Hydrox, substitute Oreo singles for the Hydrox.
